description: RAG MCP: PDFs, repos, YouTube, Discord, plain text. Index and query with citations (stdio).

name: io.github.ndjordjevic/pinrag

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key when using Claude as the LLM (default provider).
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (LLM and/or embeddings when using OpenAI). Often set together with or instead of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Chroma vector store directory (recommended so indexes are not tied to the server process cwd).
environmentVariables.name: PINRAG_PERSIST_DIR

title: PinRAG
